statement: In every magma, Equation 611 (`x = y * (z * (w * (u * w)))`) implies Equation 3875 (`x * x = (x * (y * z)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0544
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op u w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x x) = (op (op x (op y z)) z)
